name: Medusa
description: The only real beauty is power.

abilities.name: Mana Shield
abilities.description: Creates a shield that absorbs incoming damage in exchange for Medusa's mana. Illusions absorb less damage per point of mana.

abilities.name: Split Shot
abilities.description: Magically splits her shot into several arrows. These arrows deal a lower percent of her normal damage. Enables Split Shot to utilize attack modifiers. Increases the bonus attack targets.

abilities.name: Mystic Snake
abilities.description: Fires an energy bolt that jumps from target to target dealing damage. After it reaches its last target, it returns and replenishes Medusa's mana. Procs sources upon impact on each individual enemy hero per hit. The stops bouncing and immediately returns and applies the component.

abilities.name: Gorgon's Grasp
abilities.description: Applies root, True Sight, turn rate slow, and a damage per second debuff on affected enemy units within each radius.

abilities.name: Stone Gaze
abilities.description: If a certain amount of time is accumulated looking at Medusa while Stone Gaze is active, that unit will be petrified. Petrified units are stunned, and take bonus incoming physical damage. Grants self bonus movement speed while active.
